ebrecipe companion ggplot theme

Source: R/plot-theme.R
theme_ebrecipe.Rd

A restrained ggplot2 theme for companion-quality empirical Bayes figures. It keeps grids light, text compact, and plot backgrounds white so figures resemble the Walters companion outputs while remaining readable in package vignettes.

Usage

theme_ebrecipe(
  base_size = 12,
  base_family = "",
  grid = c("y", "xy", "none"),
  legend_position = "right"
)

Arguments

base_size

Base font size passed to ggplot2::theme_minimal().

base_family

Base font family passed to ggplot2::theme_minimal().

grid

Which panel grid lines to show: "y", "xy", or "none".

legend_position

Legend position passed to ggplot2::theme().

Value

A ggplot2 theme object.

Examples

# \donttest{
if (requireNamespace("ggplot2", quietly = TRUE)) {
  ggplot2::ggplot(mtcars, ggplot2::aes(wt, mpg)) +
    ggplot2::geom_point() +
    theme_ebrecipe()
}

# }
